title: December 22nd, 2021
body:
lyrics

hook

wanna fish you better hook it
look
whatever i catch you can cook it
baited
appetite whetted
bet it'll be a big one book it
no reservations
waitin to wait
plated straight off the wave i pulled it
ate it and savored
the flavor is too rich

(yo listen to this bullshit)

verse

from the ocean to oh shit
started from the bottom, we still go in
whatever thoughts haven't thawt yet
our depths are never frozen
in the darkness our ardest parts start glowing
angling to eat but dangle the meet when you're approaching
hand shaking the same motion as a cage closing
and you assuming we let go when the embrace is over
we can't do it, let's face it, some other force has taken over
it's basic fluid dynamics
the flow is too dynamic to fuck with and duck the hang over
so you mix and hope that first sip ain't game over
blame it on the yacht how wet you got when you came over
but i'll call out how i see it
the wap is the content i got flopping on my deck
you got caught lookin and ain't sober
and i ain't even drop the bomb yet
i've been fission since my first fusion
not the hybrid in my driveway
but the big pop that put everything else in my way
i been bobbin, weavin, castin
flippin, dip in, splashin
old man seen some action
pole in hand i feel the pull even before i throw it back in

what part of the game is that
who paid for your controller
i'm sorry it came to that


hook

wanna fish you better hook it
look
whatever i catch you can cook it
baited
appetite whetted
bet it'll be a big one book it
no reservations
waitin to wait
plated straight off the wave i pulled it
ate it and savored
the flavor is too rich

(yo listen to this bullshit)

verse

look it's a bird, it's a plane
what's the third thing
i forgot
not cuz i got a bird brain
i just prefer to observe and learn range
i wanna see your wings
can't flock to some surname
ugly duckin the swan song
turducken the mixtape
kingfisher the beat
the scales shimmer

i'm in there
happy to hunt but i'm trying to eat
dive in the sea
bill flashing something the red herring dying to see
do they still have it
magpie macgyvers
ey'ill fashion something spectacular
from the flotsam and jetsam before the plot gets em
no issue or episode is too dire
the heron catches what the sea sends em

frankenstein ain't the monster
tear ducts on the table
the good doctor wasn't able to place em
wish i could cry when the crowd screamin my name
good people
